MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Rubin Roger, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (206)

Appearances:
Jeff Lance, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Hayman Brothers, Inc.
Michael S. Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Otgon Bayanmunkh is present.
Jason Erlich, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per counsel Rossoff, this case has settled. The trial date is off calendar.
